redis.clients.jedis.commands

Interface RedisModuleCommands

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BloomFilterCommands, CountMinSketchCommands, CuckooFilterCommands, RedisBloomCommands, RediSearchCommands, RedisGraphCommands, RedisJsonCommands, RedisTimeSeriesCommands, TDigestSketchCommands, TopKFilterCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    JedisCluster, JedisPooled, JedisSharding, UnifiedJedis

    public interface RedisModuleCommands
extends RediSearchCommands, RedisJsonCommands, RedisTimeSeriesCommands, RedisBloomCommands, RedisGraphCommands
